title: [release-1.23 backport] bump to race-free `c/image` and `c/storage`
body:
Commits explained in bullet points.
* Bump c/storage to v1.36.3 released here: https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1173
* Bump c/image to branch v5.16.0-rhel : https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1519

For reference actual upstream PR: https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1480 and https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1153

Deps are tested here: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/13793

Needed for: BZ 2066364

comments.body: Smoke is failing cause `chroot/root.go` was not gofmt-ed here https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/3853 , I'm doing `gofmt` on `chroot/root.go` in a separate commit,I hope its ok.

LGTM
and happy green test buttons.
@containers/buildah-maintainers PTAL. Could we merge this and cut a new `1.23.x` release then I can vendor this into podman.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *flouthoc*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.23/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
We would need a release as well or i could vendor branch directly as well if that works.
@flouthoc, I'll spin one up shortly. Just getting out of morning meetings now.
I just spun one up, but I did it by hand, will see if it fails.
